summary: Iteration 188: Tested marketplace boundary enforcement, Sales Assist CTA system, and Service Quote Margin engine. All 13 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created test sales assist requests via API during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All marketplace boundary fixes verified. Sales Assist CTA system fully functional on PDP, Cart, and Checkout pages. Service Quote Margin API returns correct internal and customer views.

boundary_fix_services_landing.evidence: Found 4 links to /request-quote, no wrong links to /account/services

sales_assist_api.description: POST /api/public/sales-assist creates request with status=new and returns ok=true

sales_assist_modal_pdp.description: Clicking 'Talk to Sales' on PDP opens modal with product name pre-filled
sales_assist_modal_pdp.evidence: Modal opens with 'Classic Cotton T-Shirt' pre-filled in product field

sales_assist_modal_submit.description: Submitting the form successfully creates request and shows success message
sales_assist_modal_submit.evidence: Form submission shows 'Request Sent' success message

sales_assist_cta_card_pdp.description: Sales Assist CTA Card visible on PDP with amber styling and 'Sales Assist' badge
sales_assist_cta_card_pdp.evidence: Card found with data-testid='sales-assist-cta-card', has amber styling

sales_assist_cta_card_cart.description: Sales Assist CTA Card visible on Cart page below order summary
sales_assist_cta_card_cart.evidence: Card found on Cart page with 'Sales Assist' badge

sales_assist_cta_card_checkout.description: Sales Assist CTA Card visible on Checkout page sidebar
sales_assist_cta_card_checkout.evidence: Card found on Checkout page sidebar

sticky_mobile_sales_assist_bar.description: Sticky Mobile Sales Assist Bar present on PDP at mobile viewport (md:hidden)
sticky_mobile_sales_assist_bar.evidence: Bar visible at 390x844 viewport with 'Talk to Sales' button

service_quote_margin_api.description: POST /api/admin/service-quote-margin/preview returns internal breakdown AND customer-facing amount

service_quote_margin_customer_view.description: Customer view shows ONLY quoted_amount (no margin details)
service_quote_margin_customer_view.evidence: Customer view contains only service_name and quoted_amount

service_quote_margin_internal_view.description: Internal view shows base_tax_inclusive_cost, margin_percent, margin_value, final_quote_amount
service_quote_margin_internal_view.evidence: Internal view contains all breakdown fields

pdp_share_button.description: PDP Share button works (copies link to clipboard)
pdp_share_button.evidence: Button clickable, uses native share or clipboard API

pdp_save_button.description: PDP Save button redirects to login with toast
pdp_save_button.evidence: Redirects to /login with toast 'Log in to save items to your wishlist'

api_tests_summary.POST /api/admin/service-quote-margin/pre: PASS - Returns internal and customer views
